name: HM_silent_architecture
description: Architecture of the chr III mating-type silent cassettes. Y region is the variable Ya (~640 bp) or Yalpha (~750 bp) cassette flanked by W (~720 bp), X (~700 bp), Z1 (~240 bp), Z2 (~90 bp) homology blocks. All three loci (HML, MAT, HMR) share W/X/Z homology, so any short read covering only W/X/Z (not Y) maps to all three cassettes. Switching is initiated by HO endonuclease cut at MAT-Y/Z border, repaired by gene conversion from HML or HMR donor.
expected_copy_count: 1 active MAT + 2 silent (HML, HMR) cassettes, all on chr III
